summary:
CURRENT EVENTS AND NEWS ANALYSIS: Brandon reviews several recent news items, noting a shooting incident near J.D. Vance's motorcade in Washington, D.C., and the detainment of Nick Shirley. He mentions observations of unusual airplane activity and comments on the economy, referencing Jerome Powell, high interest rates, and the broader impact of shipping, fertilizer, and oil markets based on insights from financial commentator Johnny Bravo. Additionally, Brandon discusses a recent European summit involving the Italian Prime Minister, which he describes as containing dark and cultic symbolism, and briefly notes a temporary ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine as well as an Iranian strike on a UAE oil refinery.

FAITH SCRIPTURE AND PERSONAL PRACTICES: Brandon emphasizes the importance of relying on biblical scripture to overcome daily struggles, specifically addressing issues like insomnia, anxiety, and elevated cortisol levels. He recommends reciting verses such as Psalm 4:8 and Matthew 11:28 to achieve restful sleep and mental peace. Brandon shares confessing directly to Jesus rather than engaging with a Catholic priest, emphasizing a direct personal relationship with his faith. He also encourages individuals to find a Bible translation they clearly understand, such as the New King James or New Living Translation, to build a strong spiritual foundation rather than relying entirely on internet personalities or weekly sermons.

ECONOMIC PREDICTIONS AND PROPHETIC VISIONS: Brandon details visions he experienced regarding future global events, including rapid fluctuations in the stock market and gas prices, with a specific focus on Australia and an anticipated shortage of diesel. He describes an impending era of massive global distractions involving the release of classified alien documents, claims of extraterrestrial abductions, and alleged interdimensional travel, all of which he explains are demonic deceptions. In his descriptions, he recounts seeing an individual reappearing from the 1980s wearing vintage clothing, which he interprets as part of a broader fallen angel deception designed to mislead the public through staged supernatural encounters.

ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AND GENETIC EXPERIMENTATION: Brandon shares further accounts of his visions involving advanced artificial intelligence and genetic splicing, describing a scenario driven by a global AI race among China, America, Europe, and Japan. He states that he saw scientists in laboratories using advanced quantum computing to communicate with code-like entities to achieve rapid medical breakthroughs. According to Brandon, these experiments involve extracting DNA from deceased celebrities like Marilyn Monroe and Elvis, historical figures like King Tut, and ancient Nephilim to create human clones using baby embryos. He also mentions seeing scientists experimenting on endangered crustaceans and lizards to unlock the ability to regenerate human body parts.

POLITICAL PREFERENCES AND PROTECTION: Brandon concludes his thematic discussion by focusing on political figures, stating his support and desire for the safety of Donald Trump. He specifically lists Trump's family members, including Don Jr., Eric, Tiffany, Barron, Kai, and Ivanka, discussing the need for their protection from harm. Brandon also extends this protective focus to political allies such as Marco Rubio and J.D. Vance, expressing a desire for the stimulation of the American economy and the presence of sound counsel in the political sphere.
rawData: [May 05, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/3EBkKb5vnrM]-[Good evening, family. Almost tomorrow. Thank you for joining us again today. We're going to pray over some things. We'll go over some things that Braden found in the news today and we'll just jump right in the river and start praying for our nation, our world, and for peace. There are a lot of things we can be praying for, but we'll go as the Holy Spirit leads us tonight. I'm just thankful for every one of you that wants to pray with us. We're just doing what we always do, seeking the Lord. Go ahead, son. Do you have anything you wanted to show everybody? There was a shooting today with an individual by the J.D. Vance motorcade in Washington, D.C. The suspect was shot, but I don't think anybody else was hurt. So, nothing fatal. I don't know why this happened, but it's pretty crazy. There's a lot of drama around Washington, D.C., but it's in the news. So, Braden brought it to you. What is this right here? What are all these planes? We have Nick Shirley—and I do not understand why this young man would do that—who went from the frying pan in America to Cuba to show everything that is going on there. From what I understand, the Cuban government is after him. He went over there to document the humanitarian crisis and what it's like to be in a communist country. I guess they think he's a spy. Is he detained? They detained him. I haven't finished the whole story, but they said they detained him and he's in a room right now. It's actually pretty dumb; 2.5 million views aren't worth it. That is nuts. We'll be praying for him to get some wisdom and come home. We need you over here uncovering the bad guys. Cuba's about to have its day. Is there more news? They're showing all the planes in the sky. A lot of planes are flying over, getting ready for something. I wonder if they're bringing some kind of supplies. I don't know what that's all about. It's a slow news day. We're going to make lemonade out of lemons. There's something about Jerome Powell. Jerome Powell is too late. Trump did that; it was a direct disaster for America. Interest rates are too high, and they're throwing Jerome Powell out in the chat. That's kind of funny. When is his last day? Tomorrow is Cinco de Mayo. Happy Cinco de Mayo to all the Latinos. Isn't that exciting? I guess for you all, though I don't really understand Cinco de Mayo. I know it's a big celebration. I know the neighbor gets drunk; he plays loud music and drinks a lot of beer. I don't know, monsters in masks. Now, this is creepy. They had some kind of summit in Europe, and somebody sent us the opening ceremony. The Prime Minister of Italy was there along with other big leaders, and it’s very creepy. It has a lot of weird, dark symbolism. You can see them doing their thing, and it has a cultic vibe. They use kids a lot. It's just creepy. I haven't watched the whole thing, but it has a very dark vibe. I don't know what it represents or why they're doing it, but goodness gracious, it's worse than the Olympics. You can see the devil horns and the weirdness. It's demonic. You can feel it. Do I have vitamins in my teeth? I know it's personal, but I want to grind it to a pulp. It gets in my bloodstream faster when I chew it up. I don't want my stomach to have to break it down, so I chew my vitamins. Ready? Is that it? I figured out that there was a ceasefire between May 8th and 9th. That's interesting. Russia declares a ceasefire with Ukraine for those two days. Russia did it? I'll have to look into that. Anything else? Iran struck a UAE oil refinery. Another oil refinery is up in flames. They're really trying for that $200 barrel, aren't they? Go Packers. There's a lot going on. Let's just pray tonight. I feel in my heart that we have much to pray about in these end times. I believe we've seen things change through prayer. There was protection over J.D. Vance today. I believe our economy needs to turn around. I'm praying for a major turnaround through the midterms. They're trying to pump the economy and cause a rally. As you listen to other YouTubers like Johnny Bravo, he talks about how the stock market isn't the indicator; it's the bond markets. I'm trying to learn all that. A healthy economy isn't necessarily about the stock market. There are other indicators to look at. It's interesting to listen to people like Johnny Bravo who are more educated on this. There's a lot to this with the oil, the fertilizer, and the farmers saying they aren't going to plant their fields because of the droughts. You just don't realize how much it affects things when you shut down the shipping industry. It's not just about oil. It's not just about—the Strait had a lot more to do with it than just oil. There are a lot of components about the economy—more than I ever realized—from gas to all these other things. Well, that's just a fraction of stuff. All right, let's pray tonight. Let's pray over our weather, pray over the rain, and we'll pray over Trump and just see where the Holy Spirit leads us. Father, I thank you for the body. We lift up this body and this time before you. Father, we enter into your throne room boldly. I thank you that you inhabit the praises of your people, and you love us so much, Father, that you abide in us. You chose to give your life for us and make us joint heirs with you, seated with you in the heavenlies, far above all principalities and powers. Father, you didn't leave us defenseless, but you gave us your son's authority in the name of Jesus that we can speak to things and call those things to be not as though they were, and know that if we're believing believers, we will see results. Whatever we put our hands to, we're going to see results—to be blessed in the city and in the field, coming in and going out. Father, I thank you, Lord, that we don't have to struggle or lack or have sickness in our bodies. Father, you are the great I AM, and you live on the inside of us. We're so thankful that we are wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. And the moment we pray and we touch and agree—as many hands make light work when we come before your throne boldly as your kids and we petition you—you said, 'If my people who are called by my name will humble themselves and pray and turn from their wicked ways, then you would hear from heaven and you would heal our land.' I believe, Father, that you're the God who is a healer of the land. I thank you right now for us all agreeing together, believing believers coming together and believing for change in our government, change in our finances, change in our health, change in our marriages, and change in our children. Whatever you're believing for, there's nothing too big for God to turn it around for you. That's why I try to say this every single time I come and pray with y'all: believe God for big. I'd rather believe God for $1 million and get $500,000 than to believe for nothing at all. Set out to believe him for big instead of thinking so small. If you get half, that's great. I believe that God is a God of multiplication, and he's able to do exceedingly, abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. It's not just about finances, but finances help a lot, don't they? When you don't have much and then you have more than enough to get your bills paid, and then if you're not feeling very good in your body and you get part of it and you say, 'At least I'm better than I was.' I'd rather have the whole thing, though. Stretch out and believe for big for your mental peace. There are so many who are dealing with mental anxiety and depression and worry that is just bombarding you. As we saw in the emails today—and Brandon, that is me—there are so many of us dealing with depression and anxiety who can't sleep at night. There were so many emails. Diana told me today, she said, 'Brandon, there are so many people that are overcoming.' And he said he'd give us perfect peace whose mind is stayed on thee, because we trusteth in thee. And I believe that peace passes all understanding. Whenever you are lying down in bed, he gives his beloved restful sleep. You have to get the Word of God down inside of your heart, and it will change you from the inside out. But if you don't have any scripture that you're standing on, you're going to go nowhere. The scripture has to back what you're praying. Find scripture that pertains to what you're believing God for: finances, a good marriage, healing in your body, whatever it may be—sleep. People say, 'I deal with insomnia.' And it's amazing, but he said there's scripture. You just have to go in there, and in the Bible app, Life.Church has that on there. You go on there and you can put in what you're believing God for. Find scriptures to stand on; I'm believing for good sleep tonight. Help me to have some good sleep. And there are so many scriptures on sleep put in here. And great, now it pulls up all the scriptures on sleep. 'How long will you sleep, O sluggard?' That's not a good one. 'Yet a little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to sleep.' That's not a good one either; that's for people being lazy. There's one in Psalms: 'He that keepeth thee shall neither slumber nor sleep.' Well, I'm looking for how you get to sleep good. Well, I don't like using Google Apps. 'I will both lie down.' There you go, Psalm 4:8. Grab ahold of this, write it down, put it on a post-it note, and put it on your mirror where you're looking every morning and quote this scripture over your mind. Put it on your visor or on your dash and go back to Psalm 4:8: 'I will both lie down and sleep, for you alone, O Lord, make me dwell in safety.' That's a good one. 'When you lie down, you will not be afraid; when you lie down, your sleep will be sweet.' So I claim that. Grab hold of that and say, 'That's me.' Put your name in it: 'When Brandon lies down, he will not be afraid. Brandon, when you lie down, your sleep will be sweet.' Add your name to it; make it personal. When the Word of God gets personal to you, it becomes real in your spirit. This isn't somebody else's God; this is for you. This isn't your mama's gospel that you fall back on. When you get real, God will become real with you. Psalm 127:2: 'It is in vain that you rise up early and go late to rest, eating the bread of anxious toil, for he gives to his beloved sleep.' Matthew 11:28: 'Come to me, all who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.' So you can go on and on. But after I heard so many people say that they had problems sleeping and problems resting at night, you have to renew your mind to the Word of God. The only thing that's going to change for you is when the word gets inside of you. The only thing I'm saying is the only way your circumstances are going to change is when you get the Word of God inside of you and it becomes alive. Like I said, if you don't aim high and you just get part, at least you got something. I think people get so upset about things and they don't even try. They have that victim mentality, and there ain't nobody else who can feel sorry for you. You've got to grab ahold of this like a bull and throw that bull down on the ground. When you go steer wrestling, you throw it down on the ground, and you either have it or you don't. If not, that thing's going to run you over. Grab ahold of it, pull those horns down to the ground, and do what you need to do. Take care of business. But you've got to get bold inside of yourself and say, 'Enough's enough, devil. I'm not going to allow you to torment me anymore.' I'm done being tormented in the night. I'm done being tormented in my sleep. You're not going to bother me; I'm going to sleep. When I put my head down, I call my cortisol levels normal. I call my adrenal glands to function. That was one of the words the Lord gave us last night; we were praying over adrenal glands and over cortisol levels being too high or spiking at night when they're supposed to be normal, calling your hormones to line up with the Word of God. Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition—with thanksgiving—present your request to God, and the peace of God will guard your heart and your mind in Christ Jesus. You keep him in perfect peace whose mind is stayed on you because you trust. First Peter 5:7: 'Cast all your anxieties on him because he cares for you.' I lay down and sleep; I woke up again, for the Lord sustained me. That's David. I lay down and sleep; I woke again, for the Lord sustained you. The Lord will sustain you. So get that down inside of you. Write those down and meditate on it. Meditate, meditate. Put that in your mind and mutter it out your mouth. Say it out your mouth and it will become so real to you that you'll go, 'Wow, I slept so good tonight. I see the word is working mightily in me.' That's why I say it all the time: 'The Lord is working mightily in me.' Pastor Chip sings that: 'No matter what I see or feel, I believe it's what's going on in me; the word is working mightily in me.' So I just try to give you that because there are so many people that say they're having a hard time, and I don't know how else to get out of a hard time either except through the Word of God. Even in the darkest hours of my life, there was nobody else there to hold my hand; it was that bulldog—I'm going to get out of this; I'm on a bone; I'm not going to give up. I don't care what a psychiatrist tells you. I don't care what kind of medicine they try to put you on. Real results, real things that will change you forever and you'll never look back, is the Word of God. It is a lamp to my feet and a light unto my path. I will hide it in my heart that I might not sin against him. And the more that word becomes a light unto my path, the more you know the truth, and the truth will set you free. And that's what I'm trying to tell you tonight. I've seen it work time and time and time again. You know the truth, and the truth will set you free. Psalm 119:105: 'The word is a lamp unto my feet and a light unto my path.' I will hide it in my heart that I might not sin against you, Lord. That's why I try to tell y'all, because like I said, there's so many of you that are just born again, and there's nobody teaching you in church. There's not a lot of people teaching you how to get free. They give you a good little sermon, have a little bit of worship, take up an offering, and send you on your way. And I'm going to tell you, nobody's going to get free off that. It's porridge, and you can't get strong and have the meat of the word if you're eating porridge and you are continually being fed anemic food. If you don't get ahold of some kind of T-bone steak in the spirit realm and you start eating on that and you get some meat on your bones, you sit there and go, 'Hey, when the enemy comes like a roaring lion seeking whom he may devour...' Who are the Christians that he doesn't devour? He's seeking who he can. That means there's some of them he can't. Who are the Christians that he can't devour? The one who is filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost and knows who they are in Christ. Read in Ephesians; get in Ephesians down deep inside of your heart, knowing who you are in Christ, and you say, 'No, Satan, thus far and no further! You will not touch my children. You'll not touch my house. You will not touch my finances, for I have authority over you.' I am seated with him in the heavenlies, far above all principalities and powers and might. I believe that as he is, so are we in this world. He'll come and test it. He'll knock on your door. But as soon as he knocks on your door, it's like the FedEx guy; you say, 'Yeah, that ain't my package; take that package back.' He tries to deliver a poopoo package, a big old box full of devil poo on your porch, and he's going to say, 'Do you want to accept my package?' and you say, 'No, get out of here and return to sender; I don't want it. You don't have power to put it on me.' The Bible says a curse without a cause cannot stand. They can't curse you because they can't curse whom God has blessed. The blood of Jesus is against them. That's why we take communion. That's why we understand who we are when we anoint our head with oil and my cup runneth over. Surely goodness and mercy will follow me all the days of my life, and I will dwell in the house of the Lord forever. Either you believe it or you don't, but the only way you're going to start to even believe it a little bit is getting that word down inside of your heart. Then it gets bigger; it becomes a foundation and you go, 'Hey, I can build on this.' But if you don't have a foundation, if you don't have a taproot—a taproot is what grows that tree—you've got to have a taproot first. But if that taproot is not down inside of your heart of the Word of God, the wind and the storms of life will blow your house right over. But a house that is built on the solid rock and the Word of God will not be shaken, will not bent or bow down to any storm. It will withstand the storms and the trials of life. But if you don't have the Word of God down inside of you, you're in trouble. And I told you again, from what I have seen coming, we are in the end—the last of the last days. Jesus Christ is coming, and he's coming for a church without spot or wrinkle that has a backbone like a crowbar. He ain't coming back for a weak, anemic church that's in retreat mode; he's coming back for a glorious church. And I'm trying to tell you tonight, the only way you will become victorious in your walk with him is by knowing him and through His word—not by some prophet on YouTube, not by hearing some sermon all the time on YouTube. The only thing that is going to change it from the inside out is you getting the dust off the Bible that you have and opening it up, and it will change you from the inside out and it will become light. The entrance of His Word brings forth light, and it will change you as you renew your mind to the Word of God. It's boring. I don't want to read. Find a scripture that pertains to you and what you understand. People get upset about certain Passion Translations and New Living and all this, but I don't read those. I read the New King James, I read the Amplified, and things like that. But you've got to find something that you can understand. If you don't understand the King James, find the New King James. Maybe you like the New King James, but find something that will minister to you, that you can get ahold of and start there. Just avoiding it altogether is not going to get you anything out of it. If you don't understand what you're reading, you might as well just put it on the shelf. Find a version that ministers to you, and read it and read it. Faith comes by hearing and hearing by the Word of God. I try to tell you all this because those that are not listening—he that has ears to hear, let him hear what the Spirit is saying. And Jesus is coming, and he's coming sooner than you think. But there's many of you that are asleep. And the Lord said, 'I'm bringing forth a great shaking to awaken, and when I do so, it will shake the church out of the slumber that it's been in.' I don't know exactly when that day's coming, but I saw it again even today. The Lord said, 'I was looking toward the east.' And the Lord started talking to me about the East and what's coming. There's a lot of people who don't realize that he's given you just a little bit of time to prepare to get your heart right. He's so merciful. So I have to tell you that little stuff right there—that's something for you to meditate on and stir yourself up a little bit, maybe. All I know to do is just keep bringing you to the well. If you don't want to drink, don't drink. But if you drink from the well, you will never thirst again. That's why I sing, 'Fill My Cup, Lord, I Lift It Up, Lord,' because we leak out. But once you taste the living—that word, the word of God—and it becomes alive, you'll crave it forever. When you've had the authentic, the true... there's a lot of you that have never experienced 'taste and see that the Lord is good.' You've only been able to walk around the edges of the lake, but you've never gone down and gotten to take a drink of it. There's so much more than salvation. There's so much more than going to church just one time a year on Christmas or Easter. Oh, taste and see that the Lord is good. It's not religious to me; it's relationship. And there's so many people who ask me, 'What, do you have to pray to a Catholic priest to forgive you of your sins?' No, I don't believe that. 'Confess your faults one to another, that ye may be healed.' The Bible says you can confess your faults one to another; there's scripture to back that up. But I believe that if you confess your sins, he is faithful and just to forgive you of your sins and cleanse you of all unrighteousness. I confess my sins to Jesus. I never confessed them to a Catholic priest. I confess my sins to Jesus today. 'Jesus, I have missed it today. Forgive me.' I don't have to wait for mass or whatever they do when they go to the confession booth to talk to the priest. I talk to Jesus because he lives on the inside of me, and the moment I mess up, I have that conviction that says I messed up. 'Oh, Jesus, change me from the inside out. I need you.' He is an ever-present help in a time of need. I go to Jesus directly and say, 'Jesus, have mercy on me. I need you.' I don't need a Catholic priest to help me; I've got Jesus. I'm wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. Either you believe it or you don't. It's a relationship with me. And the more you get real, God will become real to you. When you start to see the things that the Lord has shown me—he is no respecter of persons. What he's done for my life, he will do for you. This is James 5:16: 'Confess your faults one to another, and pray one for another, that ye may be healed. The effectual fervent prayer of a righteous man availeth much.' So I try to figure out where they get the scriptures telling me I had to talk to a priest. But I'm going to tell you, Jesus is my high priest. Jesus is my Savior, and I'm not going to go to a Catholic church and confess my sins there. I'm going strictly to him and saying, 'Jesus, I messed up today. I have a relationship with you.' I can read this Bible and it will change me from the inside out. It's called relationship. The moment you let that light switch click on and let the elevator go to the top that he paid the price for you to walk in victory—there is no man that's going to get you there other than the Lord Jesus Christ. Accepting him and sitting at his feet on a day-to-day basis and saying, 'Jesus, change me. I'm created in your image. I am in your likeness. I know I'm wall-to-wall Holy Ghost, but Holy Spirit, teach me.' The Holy Spirit will teach you in all things, in all truth. Jesus said that. Braden finds these scriptures; I don't have them all memorized yet, but I have parts of them. James 5:16, though, that's a good one. 'The effectual fervent prayer of the righteous man availeth much.' There it is. However, John 16:13: 'Howbeit when he, the Spirit of Truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth; for he shall not speak of himself, but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak, and he will show you things to come.' So you can talk to him about anything, and he's going to show you things to come. He's no respecter of persons. That's what I believe a watchman does—he will show you things to come. It ain't Brandon Biggs up here telling you things are coming. I believe when the Spirit of Truth is come, he will guide you into all truth. For he shall not speak of himself, but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak, and he will show you things to come. And I believe with all my heart that King James Version is kind of... it's kind of too much 'ye's and all that. New Living Translation again: 'I still have many things to say to you, but you cannot bear them now.' So when people say, 'Well, Brandon, you should tell everything,' well, Jesus couldn't even tell the people everything. 'I still have many things to say to you, but you cannot bear them now.' There's things that the people will joke on if you tell them. I have something I wanted to tell you today, but the Lord said they can't handle that yet. I had a visitation in my dreams last night, and the Lord spoke to me big time. I was so excited; I told Braden and them, and they looked at me like I had two heads. I said, 'Yeah, it challenged me too.' But I still have many things to say to you, but you cannot bear them now. However, when he, the Spirit of Truth, has come, he will guide you into all truth. For he will not speak on his own authority, but whatever he hears, he will speak and he will tell you things to come. He will glorify me, for he will take of what is mine and declare it to you. See, that's what I'm saying. If you don't understand what you're reading and it gets hard, find a version that you can understand. I have to, because I overcome stuff and I sit there and I have to learn. I have to read that sometimes five or six times. I can barely comprehend stuff. And that's why I have Diana read to me all the time. So I can understand when I hear her reading to me; when I read it, I overcome. And when she reads to me, I hear it the first time. I'm just being real, y'all, but it's what's happened over the years. And that's why Diana reads to me all the time. I'm so thankful for my wife reading to me. She reads to me and I grasp it the first time. I say, 'Read it again,' because she'll read it and read it. But me hearing is a lot different than me passing my eyes over it, but I don't know, I'm getting better. There is so much more I want to tell you—that's the New Living Translation—but you cannot bear it. Now when the Spirit of Truth comes, he will guide you into all truth. He will not speak of his own, but will tell you what he has heard. He will tell you about the future; that's what he does all the time. He will bring me glory by telling you whatever he receives from me. That's a good translation; I like it. It's not confusing, like the New Living Translation. So I'm just trying to tell you all, the Holy Spirit is going to help you. You just have to seek him, and the more you seek him, you'll find him. All this religious stuff, you'll put it aside and be like, 'I don't even know why I ever went down that path in the first place.' It was dead and lifeless, and God is alive. A river is not stagnant; a river flows, and out of your belly shall flow rivers of living water. When you get in the vine, if you get in that Holy Ghost flow, you'll never go stagnant. You're never going to be lacking anything; a river never lacks. It always flows, and there's always a source. He is the source, and you'll never run dry. As long as you are abiding in him, sitting at his feet, he'll change you from the inside out. So, Father, we just thank you again, as I said, for the body; we take this in the name of Jesus. Amen and amen. I got sidetracked, but I try to tell you all this because it's worked for me. There are things that I struggled with a long time, but when I got that word down inside of me, it changed me. And I'm so thankful for the word. Thank God for the word. The word will work for you if you work it. Thank you for the blood, and we apply the blood of Jesus over us. Father, if there's anything you want to show us tonight—it's late now—but Father, we're so thankful. Father, we'll pray for a little bit here and seek you. We thank you, Lord, that we can get a lot done in just 30 to 45 minutes. We take the blood and we apply it to our lives. And we thank you, Lord, that it never loses its power, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I apply the blood of Jesus over my eyes and over my mind, and I thank you, Lord, that I hear you in a still small voice. I lay hold to it, and I thank you, Father. I tell you, Satan, get out of here in Jesus' name. I will not hear the devil's voice; I hear my Father. And if there is anything, Father, you want to show me, I yield to you. I yield to the anointing of the prophetic; I yield to the anointing of the watchman, and we will do whatever we can to help you, Father, tonight, in Jesus' name. Amen and amen. I put my minerals in my water, and I've been taking my minerals every day. I thank God for that; it really does help. You don't realize how depleted our food is until you start taking minerals, and I go, 'Wow, that really makes you feel good.' It tastes like trash, but it does make you feel good. Chapter 3: Prayer.
